ongoing.title: 2 Up Early Payout
ongoing.description: Bet on team to win 90 minutes; if they go 2 goals ahead at any point, bet settles as winner regardless of final score. **Applies to settled match winner bets (not draw no bet).** No stated max stake on this feature.

ongoing.title: Super Sub
ongoing.description: If your backed player is substituted and the sub scores, bet settles as winner.

ongoing.title: Paddy's Rewards Club
ongoing.description: Deposit and bet each week for up to £50/week in free bets. Weekly qualifying threshold undisclosed — typically ~£25–£50 wagered.

ongoing.title: £1 free Bet Builder per shot on target
ongoing.description: Triggered by placing first £10 Golden Boot bet (valid June 1–17, 2026). Pick a Golden Boot contender, earn £1 FB per shot on target across tournament.

boosts.title: Power Prices / Match Odds Price Boosts
boosts.description: Daily enhanced odds on selected WC matches. No stake cap published but typically £5–£25 max at boosted price. Rotate daily — check app each morning.

ongoing.title: Acca Freeze
ongoing.description: Lock in a winning acca leg when a team goes 2 goals ahead — that leg counts as won regardless of final score.

ongoing.title: £5m England Jackpot
ongoing.description: Bet min £5 on any WC Outright market or Outright BuildABet at 1/2+; share £5m jackpot if England win the tournament. Jackpot increases £100k per England goal scored. Available to new and existing customers.

ongoing.title: Sky Bet Club
ongoing.description: Bet £30 in a calendar week, receive free bets credited the following Monday.

ongoing.title: Request A Bet / #BuildABet insurance
ongoing.description: Available on selected fixtures.

boosts.title: Acca Edge
boosts.description: Automatic % boost on returns for multi-leg accas (number of legs determines boost %).

boosts.title: Offers Hub
boosts.description: Updated daily with current price boosts, money-back offers, and free bets.

ongoing.title: 2 Up (Two Goals Ahead) Early Payout
ongoing.description: Identical mechanics to Paddy Power's version — bet on 90-minute match winner, settle early if team goes 2-0 up. Available pre-match only. **This is a genuine +EV feature** when combined with correct score analysis; if you back a -1 handicap team, the 2-goal lead also triggers payout at the flat win price.

ongoing.title: Jackpot365
ongoing.description: New progressive jackpot feature launched for WC 2026 — details limited; check app.

ongoing.title: Sub On Play On
ongoing.description: Bet on a player to score; if they are substituted, bet remains live on the replacement.

boosts.title: Bet Builder Boost (25%)
boosts.description: 25% winnings boost on selected Bet Builder bets on WC matches. Stake cap applies (typically £25–£50 on boosted portion).

boosts.title: Super Boosts
boosts.description: Daily super-enhanced odds on specific WC markets; max stake typically £1–£5 at boosted price.

ongoing.title: 2 Up
ongoing.description: Same as bet365/Paddy Power — 2 goals ahead triggers early payout on match winner bets.

ongoing.title: #YourOdds
ongoing.description: Request custom market on Twitter/X; William Hill traders price and activate it.

ongoing.title: Final One Standing
ongoing.description: Competition with £250,000 prize pool (details at WH website).

boosts.title: Epic Boost
boosts.description: Enhanced odds on a featured WC market each day; typically capped at £25 max stake.

boosts.title: Daily Odds Boosts
boosts.description: Multiple boosted markets per matchday beyond the single Epic Boost.

boosts.title: Acca Winnings Boost
boosts.description: Up to 25% boost on winning accas/Bet Builders meeting qualifying conditions.

ongoing.title: Bet Builder Offer — Belgium vs Iran
ongoing.description: Opt in. Bet Builder single (3/1+) on BEL/IRN. 3+ legs. 100% stake back, max £5 Free Bets, if the Bet Builder loses. No pre-built builders. Paid in 24hrs. Removed after 48hrs.

ongoing.title: Bet Builder Winning Bonus — Uruguay vs Cape Verde
ongoing.description: Opt in required. Bet Builder single (3/1+) on selected matches. 3+ legs. 50% cash winnings bonus. No pre-built builders. Paid in 24hrs. £50 max stake. Max one bonus per customer.

ongoing.title: Bet £10 & Get £10 In Free Bets
ongoing.description: Opt-in required. Bet Builder single (3/1+) on any ENG/SCOT World Cup match. 3+ legs. Min stake £10. Pre-built builders do not apply. Max £10 in Free Bets for Bet Builder. Paid on settlement. 5-day expiry.

ongoing.title: Double or Treble Odds — First Goalscorer
ongoing.description: Pre-match single on First Goalscorer market in selected games. Get double or treble odds if your winning First Goalscorer bet scores a second or third. Paid in cash on market settlement. 90 mins only.

ongoing.title: 2-Up Early Payout
ongoing.description: Pre-match Football bets on the 2 Up Early Payout market in selected games. Paid as a winner within 5 minutes if your team goes 2 goals ahead. Selected leagues only. 90 mins only.

ongoing.title: Acca Flex
ongoing.description: Football accumulators, 5+ legs, all markets. Min odds 1/2 per leg. 5%-100% cash bonus if all selections win. £10 max refund if one leg loses. Paid within 24hrs of bet settlement. No Cash Out bets.

ongoing.title: Beat Fred
ongoing.description: Free to Play. Individual game periods. Answer 6 questions prior to start. 6 correct: share £25,000. 5 correct: £2 Free Bets. 4 correct: £1 Free Bets. 3 correct: £0.50 Free Bets. 0-2: no win. 7-day expiry. Credited within 48 hours.

boosts.title: Matchday Turbo Boosts
boosts.description: Look out for boosted odds every matchday. Singles only. Max stakes vary. Limited availability.

ongoing.title: Commission structure (My Betfair Rewards — verified)
ongoing.description: Three tiers, switchable once per month: Basic (2%), Rewards (5%, the default for new accounts), Rewards+ (8%). New accounts default to Rewards (5%). **Switch to Basic (2%) immediately after registering** to halve your transaction costs on every winning trade. The Basic tier trades off some rewards/bonuses for the lower rate — at a £1,000 bankroll optimised for CLV, Basic is optimal.

ongoing.title: Expert Fee (ex-Premium Charge)
ongoing.description: Replaced the Premium Charge in December 2024. Applies only if gross profit over 52 active weeks exceeds £25,000. Rate is 20% of gross profit for £25k–£100k, 40% above £100k — on top of standard commission. At a £1,000 bankroll this will not trigger.

ongoing.title: World Cup Exchange markets expanded
ongoing.description: 54 outright markets (vs 42 at Qatar 2022). In-play liquidity highest of all platforms.

ongoing.title: Sportsbook promos (separate from Exchange)
ongoing.description: Betfair Sportsbook offers its own sign-up and tournament promos; funds are separate.

signup_offers.offer: Bet £10, get £30 in free bets (valid 7 days). No current promo code confirmed — do not apply BETMAX (unverified). Min odds 1/5 (1.20).

New customers only. Register, deposit with Debit Card, and place first bet £10+ at Evens (2.0)+ on Sports within 7 days to get £30 in Sports Free Bets and £20 in Bet Builder Free Bets within 24 hours of settlement. 7-day expiry. Eligibility and payment exclusions apply.
Bet £10, get £50 in free bets. Promotion runs 1 June–19 July 2026. E-wallets (Neteller/Skrill) excluded.
Qualifying £10 bet unlocks £10 FB per Kane WC goal (cap £60, 7-day expiry each). New customers only; goals in regular time and extra time qualify; penalties do not count.
Bet £10, get £30 in free bets (3x£10, 7-day expiry, at evens+)
Bet £10, get £30 in free bets (£20 sports + £10 Bet Builder). Qualifying bet must settle within 14 days. Free bets accepted within 7 days of credit, valid 7 days. Min odds 1/2 (1.5).
Bet £10, get £30 free bets (3x£10). Min odds 1/2. E-wallets excluded.

watchlist.description: Standard sign-up offer only; no major ongoing tournament promos identified at time of writing. May update as tournament progresses — check app.
